S.FORM: Canada tatangahan:u siwkay nu kanatal u Canada sa ilabu nu kaamisan a Amilikaan, itiza i 45 00 N, 75 00 W, u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 9,984,670 km2, u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 9,093,507 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 891,163 km2, hamin nu tademawan sa 35,362,905. kakalukan umah sa 6.80%, kilakilangan umah sa 34.10%, zumaay henay umah sa 59.10%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Ottawa . sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sa 1 bulad 7 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Elizabeth II, micakat a demiad sa i 1952 a mihca 2 bulad 6 demiad. u kulit nu hata nu Canda kanatal sa, situsa ku kulit, u sumanahay atu salengacay. i telung sa u papah nu kilang. uyniyan a kanatal, sienaw i kasienawan, yadah ku suledah i buyubuyuan. u hata u kulit nu hata nu kanatal sa, situsa a kulit. u sumanahay atu sangelacay. u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam: Śä†śčŅŚ§ß u sulit nu Lipun: „āę„Éä„ÉÄ u sulit nu Amilika: Canada Canada kamu nu United Kingdom, kamu nu France, Canada, IPA u kaku sa/'k√¶n…ôd…ô/(ing a kamu)/kanada/(ba'a kamu)"i kaamisan a Amilikaan (Pey-miy-zuw a kanatal, nutipan i sasa nu waliyu , nuwalian a katukuh i saetipyu , nuamisan a kuli a bayu katukuh i Ba-bing-yang, nuwalian nuwamisanay atu Denmark a lalaan mapapauwan tu Greenland, nuwamisan atu Sen-pi-ye mapapauwan tu Mi-ke-lung-yung-daw , tunulan atu satipan atu A-mi-li-ka matatulas ku lala', Canada a ku ahebal nu lala', pakala tu 998 a bang 4,670 km2, mahamin i kitakit ku a hebal sakatusa nu tabakiay a kanatal, satu u macakatay a kanatalan, u satabakiay nu hekal a lala'. singanga tu a kanatal han. (u sulit nu hulam: Canada ŤčĪŤ™ě,ś≥ēŤ™ě:Canada,IPAŤģÄťü≥:/'k√¶n…ôd…ô/ /kanada/ ) .) uyni u macakatay a kanatalan a hebal ku lala', uynian a kanatal kahenulan a tuse u Ottawa , kahenulan a tuse u Vancouver (Wen-ke-hua śļęŚď•ŤŹĮ), Toronto (Du-lun-du Ś§öŚÄęŚ§ö) atu Montreal (Men-te-lou ŤíôÁČĻŚ©Ā), hamin u kanatal cacay a bataan a kenis atu nisapulungan tu tuluay a kakitizaan, Canada mapasilut nu Bu-bi-se sh√¨"ŚĮĆśĮĒŚ£ę"i 2020 a mihcaan miales mabulaw nueneng singangan tunian a kanatal. Canada i ayaw nu 1,400 a mihcaan izaw tu ku yuancumin mauzip, kasumamadan tu sazikuzan tu 15 a mihcaan, United Kingdom atu France micumutay a tademawan malingatu tu amisuninip tu nuwamisan a Amilikan a nuwalian a tukus satu i tini patizeng tu micunutay a tademaw, 1763 a mihcaan , yu pituay a mihcaan namalepun ku ngangayaw hawsa France mapacici' tu mahamin tu ku nuwamisan a Amilikan a micunutay makelap pabeli tu United Kingdom). kilul satu tu pinaay a cacay bataan a mihcaan, United Kingdom nu mitebungay a tademaw pasaysatipan amin suninip tu tay-ping -yang a kakitizaan patizeng satu pinaay tu baluhay nu micumutay a tademaw, 1867 a mihcaan 7 a bulad 1 a demiad, 1867 a mihcaan maawas tu ku nipahulican a hulic, Canada a kenis maletak u An-da-luy atu Kuy-be-ke a kenis, atu baluhay Bu-lan-zi-wiy atu Sin-se-ke-si-ys tulu ku United Kingdom tungusay a nuwamisan a Amilikan micunutay misakaput tu Canada a malapulungan a kanatal , kilul tu pinaay a mihcaan, u zuma tu pinaay tu a lala'an, United Kingdom tungusay a nuwamisan a Amilikan nu micunutay tahekalay tunuan a lala', lalit amicumut tu malapulungan a kanatal , misakaput tu ayzaay a ziday, nu Canada , 1931 a mihcaan 12 a bulad 11 a demiad, United Kingdom maawas tu Si-min a saculcul a hulic, u Canada mala u masatekeday a kanatal, nika u mikelitay nu kanatal mahizatu u nitauyaay a nu United Kingdom Hung-tiay a kanatal ci Ciaw-ce-uw-se , u United Kingdom a Kuw-hey mahizatu ami emec tu Canada ni kayzuan a hulic. i kasumamadan nu Yuan-cu-min duduc tuni uni micekuway tu susumamaday hehay atu tuud u mi su subelidan tu nipasubanaan pinanaman, sayadah i 24,500 a mihcaan ayaw nayay i tini nuwamisan izaw tu ku tademawan a mi kawaw, i tiniay i tumulay An-da-lue a tademaw mikawaway a tademaw, tateng a mikilim i tiza i ayaw nu kasumamadan tu 7,500 a mihcaan, Ciw-ke-luo-pin-ti masaenalay a enal, atu Lan-uy-dung-siey buhang nisubelidan i kasasumamadan tu ni kauzip nuheni i lalabu nu kanatal a Canada u kasumamadan u sabalakiay a tademawan i tiza nueneng, siykay nu Yuan-cu-min u mizidekay a kakitizaan pasu matenesay nuenengay u kaluk kukawaw paluma'malalemelay u masaeletay u hini u satalakaw atu pacakayay a Wang-lu , nu zuma a yincumin kacakat nu siy-kay i Europe nu micumuday a tademaw katukuh i ayaw nu Canada maliwasak tu imahini pakaawas dada' tu kutkutan tu nu kasumamadan a tuud micekiw tuyzaan u nu makapatay a siy-kay. (u sulit nu hulam: .) i laylayan nau United Kingdom atu France kumicumudaay yunian a lala' Canada a lalangawan namalilit nu tusaay a kanatal atu yincumin a lalangawan tu nu kasumamadan nu babalaki a nikauzip, unian u kamu nu yincumin n nalimaan atu dadiw mahizatu malilit nu Canada a tademawan ktuud ku Canadaay a tademaw , sadi'men miazih tu yadahay a lalangawan, maazih ku yadahay a lalangawan uynian akanatal saan. (u sulit nu hulam: .) Canada a kanatal mahiza malilit nu tahak, laylay malilit nu lalay atu yincumin i mahiza u alingul nu kanatalay mahiza tu nu laylay mitalaayaw tu kasumamadan tu 18 a mihcaan, matudung makulit ku alingul i ayaw atu ayzaay hata nu Canada , cacay a kalibuwa atu I kanatalay atu Canada-ku-huy ipabaw, nu zumaay a kanatal mahiza izaw henay u He-li , Canada ngaciw Pu-tung-cang-niaw atu Hung-ya-cia-na-ta-ciy-cing . kasumamadan tu 1,000 a mihcaanay tu, Europe (O-cuo ś≠źśī≤) a tademaw saayaway a mipaemek tu nian a Canada , sumanahay a ngisngis ci Ay-zuy-ke nai Niw-ben-lan-daw a subal Lan-say- aw-ce-mu-caw-di patizeng pacena' nuengen i tiza namakay Pay-o nu micumutay hawsa, Canada ketenes tu demiad caay tu katadebin atu Europe (O-cuw ś≠źśī≤), katukuh 1497 a mihcaan Italy a tademaw ci Caw-wa-ni-ka-bu-tu nu England nu misuninipay nu Canada i saetipyu a bayuan, i kasumamadan tu 16 a mihcaan, Pa-se-ce atu Portugal i bayuay a tademaw i saetipyu a tukus patizang tu nu puu'ay miala tu cing atu mibuting i tiza, 1534 a mihcaan France nu miteswkay tu bayu a tademaw ci Ya-ce-ka-di-ya misumimip i Sen-lu-lun-se-wan , atu i 7 bulad 24 a demiad tu France ci Fa-lan-suo-wa-i'-se a ngangan tuyza a lala' miala tuyza a lala'an. kasumamadan tu 20 a mihcaan, u misakakuay mikuwanay nu Canada makelap nu United Kingdom tunu zumaay a kawaw sisa United Kingdom tuni a ngangayaw pakaynian tu ngangayaw hawsa Canada milihiza tu ngangayaw mapaculcul pasayza i satipan a ngangayawan nu Canada milihizaay a hitay a misakaput mala u tabakiay a salaput a hitay nu kalahitayay a Canad uynian a hitay i Wy-mi-ling-can-iy a ngangayaw au nu zumaay kulahenulan a ngangayawan u mala u sakahenulan a tademaw, milihiza tunian a ngangayaw 650,000 ku tademaw, u nu Canadaay a tademaw, pakala tu 173,000 a mapatayay a tademaw 173,000 madukaay a tademaw. Canada maala tu ku nuwamisanay mahamin nu kakatizaan nu Pa-mi-cuw , nu zumaay a lala' makaysatipan nu waliyu a kakitizaan, lalid katukuh i nusawalian nu saetipyu a kakitizaan, nuwamisan nayad katukuh i nuwamisan u sikuliay a bayu, u nian Greenland a kanatal u nu sawalian satipan, Sen-pi-ye-yu-mi-ke-lung-sung-daw i nu tinulan Newfoundland u pulung nu ahebal nu lala', pasu i hekalay a lala'(atu nanumay a lala')Canada hamin a kanatal sakatusa tabakiay a kanatal dada' I Russia u nian dada' i hekalay a lala' u piasip tu a hebal ciniza mahamin i kitakit, u sakasepat nu satabakiay namakay, 1925 a mihcaan malingatu tu Canada tu kamu satipan 60 du katukuh 141du nu bay-ci a kakitizaan tu uynian a lala' nika mahiza caay kakatuud ku palatatenga'ay, ciniza i kitakitan u saamisay nuenengay nu tademawan, u hitay i Ay-lel-se-mi-lel-daw subalan tu Canada-cung-tuy-cing-paw-cang . (u sulit nu hulam: Ťá™1925ŚĻīŤĶ∑, .) cen-ce cenhuśĒŅś≤ĽśĒŅŚļú Canada a zen-ze a nikuwan u hung-ti ku mipahulicay tu I-huy-ce , u nian ku San-cun-ban-li , tu ni situngusay Li-ba-cuan , Se-ba-cuan atu Sin-zen-cuan makayni I hung-ti nu Ca-na-da-cun-ku ku pahulicay ayzaay a hung-ti,u tatayna a hung-ti ci I'-li-sa-bay-e'-se , cinza mahizatu nu zumaay sabaw limaay u masatekeday tu Da-in-ku-siy a kanatal a hung-ti. uynian a kanatal u Canada a gingku uynian a kanatal tu Cung-yan a gingku, ci Se-di-ben-pu-luo-ce ku mikuwanay u kalisiw nu tapang atu nu kuziay a tapang, u Canada u nisulitan sapasilut tu ni lekakawa u zaysan nu Canada . S.FORM: Canada tatangahan:u siwkay nu kanatal u Canada sa ilabu nu kaamisan a Amilikaan, itiza i 45 00 N, 75 00 W, u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 9,984,670 km2, u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 9,093,507 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 891,163 km2, hamin nu tademawan sa 35,362,905. kakalukan umah sa 6.80%, kilakilangan umah sa 34.10%, zumaay henay umah sa 59.10%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Ottawa . sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sa 1 bulad 7 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Elizabeth II, micakat a demiad sa i 1952 a mihca 2 bulad 6 demiad. u kulit nu hata nu Canda kanatal sa, situsa ku kulit, u sumanahay atu salengacay. i telung sa u papah nu kilang. uyniyan a kanatal, sienaw i kasienawan, yadah ku suledah i buyubuyuan. u hata u kulit nu hata nu kanatal sa, situsa a kulit. u sumanahay atu sangelacay. u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam: Śä†śčŅŚ§ß u sulit nu Lipun: „āę„Éä„ÉÄ u sulit nu Amilika: Canada Canada kamu nu United Kingdom, kamu nu France, Canada, IPA u kaku sa/'k√¶n…ôd…ô/(ing a kamu)/kanada/(ba'a kamu)"i kaamisan a Amilikaan (Pey-miy-zuw a kanatal, nutipan i sasa nu waliyu , nuwalian a katukuh i saetipyu , nuamisan a kuli a bayu katukuh i Ba-bing-yang, nuwalian nuwamisanay atu Denmark a lalaan mapapauwan tu Greenland, nuwamisan atu Sen-pi-ye mapapauwan tu Mi-ke-lung-yung-daw , tunulan atu satipan atu A-mi-li-ka matatulas ku lala', Canada a ku ahebal nu lala', pakala tu 998 a bang 4,670 km2, mahamin i kitakit ku a hebal sakatusa nu tabakiay a kanatal, satu u macakatay a kanatalan, u satabakiay nu hekal a lala'. singanga tu a kanatal han. Canada maala tu ku nuwamisanay mahamin nu kakatizaan nu Pa-mi-cuw , nu zumaay a lala' makaysatipan nu waliyu a kakitizaan, lalid katukuh i nusawalian nu saetipyu a kakitizaan, nuwamisan nayad katukuh i nuwamisan u sikuliay a bayu, u nian Greenland a kanatal u nu sawalian satipan, Sen-pi-ye-yu-mi-ke-lung-sung-daw i nu tinulan Newfoundland u pulung nu ahebal nu lala', pasu i hekalay a lala'(atu nanumay a lala')Canada hamin a kanatal sakatusa tabakiay a kanatal dada' I Russia u nian dada' i hekalay a lala' u piasip tu a hebal ciniza mahamin i kitakit, u sakasepat nu satabakiay namakay, 1925 a mihcaan malingatu tu Canada tu kamu satipan 60 du katukuh 141du nu bay-ci a kakitizaan tu uynian a lala' nika mahiza caay kakatuud ku palatatenga'ay, ciniza i kitakitan u saamisay nuenengay nu tademawan, u hitay i Ay-lel-se-mi-lel-daw subalan tu Canada-cung-tuy-cing-paw-cang .
